Host exec env override sanitization did not fail closed for several package-manager and related redirect variables that can steer dependency fetches or startup behavior.

## Impact

An approved exec request could silently redirect package resolution or runtime bootstrap to attacker-controlled infrastructure and execute trojanized content.

## Affected Component

`src/infra/host-env-security-policy.json, src/infra/host-env-security.ts`

## Fixed Versions

- Affected: `< 2026.3.22`
- Patched: `>= 2026.3.22`

## Fix

Fixed by commit `7abfff756d` (`Exec: harden host env override handling across gateway and node`).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00241, "percentile": 0.14965}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j7p2-qcwm-94v4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-31T23:59:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j7p2-qcwm-94v4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j7p2-qcwm-94v4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41387"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T19:37:41Z", "published_at": "2026-03-31T23:59:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-j7p2-qcwm-94v4", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/7abfff756d6c68d17e21d1657bbacbaec86de232", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.22", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41387", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-supply-chain-redirection-via-incomplete-host-environment-sanitization", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j7p2-qcwm-94v4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-j7p2-qcwm-94v4", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw's incomplete host env sanitization blocklist allows supply-chain redirection via package-manager env overrides", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T02:36:25Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j7p2-qcwm-94v4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.3.22"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw's incomplete host env sanitization blocklist allows supply-chain redirection via package-manager env overrides
